info.title: Liferay Admin Sites Headless API
info.description: A Java client JAR is available for use with the group ID 'com.liferay', artifact ID 'com.liferay.headless.admin.site.client', and version '1.0.27'.

get.description: Retrieves a specific display page template folder of a site.

put.description: Updates the display page template folder with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific display page template folder of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves the display page template folders of the site.

post.description: Adds a new display page template folder.

get.description: Retrieves a specific display page template of a site.

put.description: Updates the display page template with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific display page template of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves all the display page templates within a display page template folder of a site page.

post.description: Adds a new display page template in draft status to a display page template folder.

get.description: Retrieves the display page templates of the site

post.description: Adds a new display page template

get.description: Retrieves all the page specifications of a display page template.

post.description: Adds a new page specification in draft status to a display page template.

get.description: Retrieves the history of previously used URLs for a display page template.
Retrieves the history of previously used URLs for a page.
Retrieves the history of previously used URLs for a utility page.
Retrieves a specific master page of a site.

put.description: Updates the master page with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific master page of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves the master pages of the site.

post.description: Adds a new master page.

get.description: Retrieves all the page specifications of a master page.

post.description: Adds a new page specification in draft status to a master page.

get.description: Retrieves a specific navigation menu of a site.

put.description: Updates the navigation menu with the given external reference code or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific navigation menu of a site.

post.description: Creates a new navigation menu.

get.description: Retrieves a page element within an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site.

put.description: Updates a page element within an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site.

delete.description: Deletes a page element within an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site.

patch.description: Updates a page element within an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site. Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves all the descendant page elements of a page element within an experience in a page specification of a site page.
Retrieves all the page elements within an experience in a page specification of a site page.

post.description: Adds a new page element to an experience in a page specification in draft status of a site page.

get.description: Retrieves an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site.

put.description: Updates an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site.

delete.description: Deletes an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site. The default experience cannot be deleted.

patch.description: Updates an experience of a specific page specification of a site page within a site. Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves all the experiences of a page specification.

post.description: Adds a new experience to a page specification of a site page.

get.description: Retrieves a page specification of a site page.

put.description: Updates a page specification of a site page.

delete.description: Deletes a page specification of a site page.

patch.description: Updates a page specification of a site page. Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves all the page specifications of a page template.

post.description: Adds a new page specification in draft status to a page template.

get.description: Retrieves all the page specifications of a site page.

post.description: Adds a new page specification to a site page.

get.description: Retrieves all the page specifications of a utility page.

post.description: Adds a new page specification to a utility page.
Publishes a page specification in draft status of a site page.

get.description: Retrieves a specific page template of a site.

put.description: Updates the page template with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific page template of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves all the page templates within a page template set of a site page.

post.description: Adds a new page template in draft status to a page template set.

get.description: Retrieves the page templates of the site

post.description: Adds a new page template

get.description: Retrieves a specific page template set of a site.

put.description: Updates the page template set with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific page template set of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves the page template sets of the site

post.description: Adds a new page template set

get.description: Retrieves a specific public page of a site.

put.description: Updates the site page with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific public page of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves the private or public pages of the site

post.description: Adds a new site page

put.description: Updates a site and all of its associated content.

delete.description: Deletes a site and all of its associated content.

put.description: Adds or update a new site

get.description: Retrieves the sites. Results can be paginated, filtered, searched, and sorted.

post.description: Adds a new site
Adds a new site based on a multipart/form-data

get.description: Retrieves a specific style book of a site.

put.description: Updates the style book with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific style book of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves the style books of the site.

post.description: Adds a new style book.

get.description: Retrieves a specific utility page of a site.

put.description: Updates the utility page with the given external reference code, or creates it if it does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a specific utility page of a site.

patch.description: Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves the utility pages of the site.

post.description: Adds a new utility page

get.description: Retrieves a widget instance of a widget page or widget page template within a site.

put.description: Updates a widget instance of a widget page or widget page template within a site.

delete.description: Deletes a widget instance of a specific widget page or widget page template within a site.

patch.description: Updates a widget instance of a widget page or widget page template within a site. Updates only the fields received in the request body, leaving any other fields untouched.

get.description: Retrieves all the widget instances of a widget page.

post.description: Adds a new widget instance to a widget page.

additionalName.description: The user's additional name, which can be used as a middle name.

externalReferenceCode.description: The user's external reference code.

image.description: A relative URL to the user's profile image.

profileURL.description: A relative URL to the user's profile.

Creator.description: The utility page's creator. It is not returned by default. It can be embedded via nestedFields.

dateCreated.description: The display page template folder's creation date.

dateModified.description: The last time any field of the display page template folder was changed.

description.description: The display page template folder's description.

externalReferenceCode.description: The display page template folder's external reference code.

key.description: The display page template folder's key.

name.description: The display page template folder's name.

parentDisplayPageTemplateFolderExternalR.description: The parent display page template folder's external reference code.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this page template folder.

DisplayPageTemplateFolder.description: The display page template's parent folder.

ActionInteraction.description: The action interaction in case the action succeeds.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type category.

value.description: Whether the fragment configuration field of type checkbox is checked.

additionalProperties.description: Whether the fragment configuration field of type checkbox is checked.

value_i18n.description: Whether the fragment configuration field of type checkbox is checked.

ClassNameReference.description: A reference specifying the class name.

ClassSubtypeReference.description: A reference specifying the class name and an optional subtype.

additionalProperties.description: The configuration keys and values of the client extension.

clientExtensionConfig.description: The configuration keys and values of the client extension.

externalReferenceCode.description: The client extension's external reference code.

ClientExtension.description: The client extension for the theme spritemap of a page specification.

collectionDisplayListStyleType.description: The collection display's list style type (ListStyle, Template).

collectionDisplayViewports.description: A list of viewports of the collection display page element.

displayAllItems.description: Whether to show all items when pagination is disabled.

displayAllPages.description: Whether to show all pages when pagination is enabled.

name.description: The custom name of a collection display page element.

numberOfItems.description: The maximum number of items to display in the collection display page element when pagination is disabled.

numberOfItemsPerPage.description: The maximum number of items per page to display in the collection display page element when pagination is enabled.

numberOfPages.description: The maximum number of pages to display in the collection display page element when pagination is enabled.

hidden.description: Specifies if the collection display is hidden to the user for the viewport.

numberOfColumns.description: The number of columns of the collection viewport if a grid list style is selected.

CollectionDisplayViewportDefinition.description: The definition of the collection display viewport.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type collection.

collectionItemConfig.description: The collection item page element's configuration.

additionalProperties.description: The configuration keys and values of the collection.

collectionConfig.description: The configuration keys and values of the collection.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type color palette.

ColorPaletteValue.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type color palette.

value.description: The value of the fragment configuration field of type color picker.

additionalProperties.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type color picker.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type color picker.

cssClasses.description: A list of CSS Classes that are applied to all viewports.

items.description: A list of CSS Classes that are applied to all viewports.

fragmentViewports.description: A list of fragment viewports of the container page element.

indexed.description: A flag that indicates whether the container page element is indexed or not.

name.description: The custom name of a container page element.

contentVisibility.description: The content visibility of the container.

draftContentPageSpecificationExternalRef.description: The draft content page specification external reference code or null if it is a draft content page specification.

dataType.description: The field's type (e.g., image, text, etc.).

name.description: The field's internal name. This is valid for comparisons and unique in the structured content.

CustomField.description: Custom fields associated with the page specification. Not available if this page specification belongs to a utility page.

data.description: The field's content value for simple types.

additionalProperties.description: The localized field's content values for simple types.

data_i18n.description: The localized field's content values for simple types.

DefaultFragmentReference.description: A reference to a default fragment (provided out-of-the-box).

defaultFragmentKey.description: The key of the default fragment.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the direct fragment image.

mappingFieldKey.description: The mapping's field key of the display page action interaction.

defaultDisplayPage.description: Default display page when a form container submission is successful.

dateCreated.description: The display page template's creation date.

dateModified.description: The last time any field of the display page template was changed.

datePublished.description: The display page template's most recent publication date.

externalReferenceCode.description: The display page template's external reference code.

additionalProperties.description: The localized relative URLs to the display page template's rendered content.

friendlyUrlPath_i18n.description: The localized relative URLs to the display page template's rendered content.

markedAsDefault.description: Whether the display page template is the default one for the given content type/subtype.

pageSpecifications.description: The display page template's specifications. A display page template will contain 1 page specifications for its draft layout and 1 page specifications for its published layout. This field is not returned by default. It can be requested via nestedFields.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this display page template.

imageAltTemplate.description: The Open Graph's image alt template.

DisplayPageTemplateOpenGraphSettings.description: The display page template's Open Graph settings.

descriptionTemplate.description: The description template of the display page template to be used as summary for search engines.

htmlTitleTemplate.description: The main title template of the display page template to be used by search engines.

additionalProperties.description: A localized tag telling search engines if and how they should crawl the display page template.

robots_i18n.description: A localized tag telling search engines if and how they should crawl the display page template.

DisplayPageTemplateSEOSettings.description: The display page template's SEO settings.

DisplayPageTemplateSettings.description: Settings of the display page template, such as SEO or OpenGraph.

addNewFragmentEntries.description: Whether to add new fragment entries automatically in the allowed fragments list.

allowedFragmentReferences.description: A list of allowed fragment references.

displayMessage.description: Whether to display a message when the collection is empty or no results match the applied filters (true by default).

additionalProperties.description: The localized message to display when the collection is empty or no results match the applied filters ('No Results Found' by default).

message_i18n.description: The localized message to display when the collection is empty or no results match the applied filters ('No Results Found' by default).

FavIcon.description: The FavIcon of the page specification.

additionalProperties.description: The configuration keys and values of the client extension.

clientExtensionConfig.description: The configuration keys and values of the client extension.

externalReferenceCode.description: The client extension's external reference code.

numberOfSteps.description: The form container page element's number of steps.

cssClasses.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the form container page element.

items.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the form container page element.

fragmentViewports.description: A list of fragment viewports of a form container page element.

indexed.description: A flag that indicates whether the form container is indexed or not.

name.description: The custom name of a form container page element.

type.description: The form container reference. Can be a class subtype reference or a context reference.

additionalProperties.description: The localized help texts of the form fragment.

helpText_i18n.description: The localized help texts of the form fragment.

additionalProperties.description: The localized labels of the form fragment.

label_i18n.description: The localized labels of the form fragment.

readOnlyField.description: Whether to render as read-only field.

showHelpText.description: Whether to show the help text.

cssClasses.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the form step container page element.

items.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the form step container page element.

fragmentViewports.description: A list of fragment viewports of a form step container page element.

type.description: The configuration field's type (category, checkbox, collection, colorPalette, colorPicker, item, length, navigationMenu, select, text, URL, video).

FragmentConfigurationFieldValue.description: The value of a fragment configuration field.

fragmentDropZoneId.description: The id of the fragment drop zone

FragmentEditableElement.description: The fragment editable elements of the the fragment instance.

prefix.description: The fragment link prefix of a fragment editable element value.

FragmentEditableElementValueFragmentLink.description: The fragment link of a fragment editable element value.

additionalProperties.description: The localized fragment image's descriptions.

fragmentImageViewports.description: A list of viewports configuration of the fragment image.

resolution.description: The resolution of the fragment image viewport.

additionalProperties.description: The localized fragment's inline values.

FragmentInlineValue.description: The localized submission of URL type.

cssClasses.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the fragment instance.

items.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the fragment instance.

datePropagated.description: The fragment instance's most recent propagation date.

draftFragmentInstanceExternalReferenceCo.description: The external reference code of the corresponding fragment instance in the draft of the page. Available only in the published page specification.

fragmentConfigurationFieldValues.description: The fragment configuration field values of the fragment instance.

fragmentEditableElements.description: The fragment editable elements of the the fragment instance.

fragmentInstanceExternalReferenceCode.description: The fragment instance's external reference code.

fragmentViewports.description: A list of fragment viewports of the fragment instance.

indexed.description: A flag that indicates whether the fragment instance is indexed or not.

name.description: The custom name of a fragment instance.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this fragment instance.

widgetInstances.description: A list of widget instances within the fragment instance.

FragmentInstance.description: The fragment instance of the form fragment page element definition.

target.description: The fragment link value's target (blank, self).

FragmentLink.description: The fragment link of the container page element.

additionalProperties.description: The localized fragment's inline values.

FragmentLinkTextValue.description: The link text value for the text fragment editable element value.

type.description: The fragment link value's hypertext reference. Can be an inline value or mapped to an external value.
The fragment mapped item reference. Can be a context reference value or external reference to an external value.

FragmentReference.description: A list of allowed fragment references.

customCSS.description: Custom CSS that is applied to the fragment viewport.

hidden.description: Specifies if the fragment's viewport is hidden to the user.

friendlyUrlPath_i18n.description: The old localized relative URLs to the page's rendered content.

FriendlyUrlHistory.description: The history of previously used URLs to the utility page's rendered content. This field is not returned by default. It can be requested via nestedFields.

additionalProperties.description: The localized custom titles.

useCustomTitle.description: Whether to use a custom title.

latitude.description: The latitude of a point in space.

longitude.description: The longitude of a point in space.

Geo.description: A point determined by latitude and longitude.

cssClasses.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the row page element.

items.description: A list of CSS classes that are applied to the row page element.

gridViewports.description: A list of viewports configuration of the grid page element.

gutters.description: A flag that indicates whether the row page element has gutters.

indexed.description: A flag that indicates whether the row page element is indexed or not.

name.description: The custom name of a row page element.

numberOfModules.description: The row page element's number of modules.

reverseOrder.description: A flag that indicates whether the row page element has reverse order.

customCSS.description: Custom CSS that is applied on the container viewport's page element.

modulesPerRow.description: The number of modules per grid.

verticalAlignment.description: The vertical alignment property of the grid viewport.

GridViewportDefinition.description: The definition of the grid viewport.

type.description: Whether the value is set inline or mapped.

HTMLFragmentValue.description: The fragment editable element's HTML. Can be inline or mapped to an external value.

IconImageURL.description: The IconImage of the page specification.

ImageValue.description: The localized value of the direct fragment image.

ItemExternalReference.description: A unique reference to an entity which remains constant across environments.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type item.

ItemValue.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type item.

Layout.description: The form container page element's layout.

value.description: The value of the fragment configuration field of type length.

additionalProperties.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type length.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type length.

gutters.description: A flag that indicates whether the collection display page element has gutters if a grid list style is selected.

verticalAlignment.description: The vertical alignment property of the collection display page element if a grid list style is selected.

unlocalizedFieldsState.description: The state of the unlocalized fields.

Mapping.description: The mapping of the fragment mapped value.

moduleViewports.description: A list of module viewports of the module page element.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type navigation menu.

NavigationMenuValue.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type navigation menu.

nestedWidgetSections.description: The sections of a nested applications widget instance.

widgetPageWidgetInstances.description: A list of the widget instances within this nested widget section.

NestedWidgetSection.description: The sections of a nested applications widget instance.

reload.description: Whether to reload the page after the action is executed.
Whether to reload the page after the action is executed.

externalReferenceCode.description: The page element's external reference code. Unique within the site.

pageElements.description: A list of the page elements this page element has.

parentExternalReferenceCode.description: The parent's page element's external reference code. Unique within the site.

position.description: The 0-based position this page element occupies with respect to its siblings (0 for first child, 1 for second child, ...). If not specified when creating a page element the page element will be added at the last valid position.

PageElement.description: The page elements in the experience.

type.description: The page element definition's type (basic fragment, collection display, collection item, container, drop zone, form container, form fragment, form step, form step container, fragment drop zone, grid,  module or widget).

externalReferenceCode.description: The experience's external reference code, unique per site.

additionalProperties.description: The localized experience's names.

pageElements.description: The page elements in the experience.

pageSpecificationExternalReferenceCode.description: The page specification's external reference code.

priority.description: The experience's priority. It must be a unique value within the page specification. The default experience will always be assigned priority 0. A priority higher than 0 will result in an experience being active and a priority lower than 0 will result in an experience being inactive.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this page experience.

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the page specification. Not available if this page specification belongs to a utility page.

externalReferenceCode.description: The page specification's external reference code, unique per site.

siteTemplatePageSpecificationExternalRef.description: The site template page specification's external reference code.

status.description: The status of the page specification.

type.description: The type of the page specification.

PageSpecification.description: The utility page's specifications. A utility page will contain 1 page specifications for its draft layout and 1 page specifications for its published layout. This field is not returned by default. It can be requested via nestedFields.

RepeatableFieldsCollectionProviderRefere.description: A unique reference to a repeatable fields collection which remains constant across environments.

externalReferenceCode.description: The scope's external reference code.

value.description: The value of the fragment configuration field of type select.

additionalProperties.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type select.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type select.

colorSchemeName.description: The page specification's color scheme name.

globalCSSClientExtensions.description: The client extensions for global CSS associated to the page.

globalJSClientExtensions.description: The client extensions for global JS associated to the page.

additionalProperties.description: The page specification's theme settings.

include.description: Whether search engines should crawl and index the page.

includeChildSitePages.description: Whether search engines should crawl and index the child pages.

pagePriority.description: How the page should be prioritized relative to other pages.

changeFrequency.description: Indicates how often a page is updated.

SitemapSettings.description: Represents settings related with the site map.

type.description: The form container success form container submission result type.

SuccessFormContainerSubmissionResult.description: The definition of the result when a form container submission is successful.

listItemStyleClassName.description: The style className of a list of items in the collection display page element.

listStyleClassName.description: The style className of a list in the collection display page element.

templateKey.description: The collection display page element's template key.

value.description: The value of the fragment configuration field of type text.

additionalProperties.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type text.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type text.

type.description: Whether the value is set inline or mapped.

TextFragmentValue.description: The fragment editable element's text value.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type URL.

URLValue.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type URL.

value_i18n.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type video.

VideoValue.description: The localized value of the fragment configuration field of type video.

additionalProperties.description: The configuration keys and values of the widget instance.

widgetConfig.description: The configuration keys and values of the widget instance.

customizable.description: A flag that indicates whether the widget page section is customizable or not.

widgetPageWidgetInstances.description: A list of the widget instances within this page section.

WidgetPageSection.description: The sections of a widget page.

widgetPageSections.description: The sections of a widget page.

externalReferenceCode.description: The external reference code of the widget instance.

parentSectionId.description: The section's ID of the widget page or the nested application widget instance this widget belongs to.

parentWidgetInstanceExternalReferenceCod.description: The external reference code of the parent widget instance. Only available if this widget instance is within a nested applications widget instance.

position.description: The 0-based position this widget instance occupies with respect to its siblings (0 for first child, 1 for second child, ...). If not specified when creating a widget instance the widget instance will be added at the last valid position.

additionalProperties.description: The configuration keys and values of the widget instance.

widgetConfig.description: The configuration keys and values of the widget instance.

actionIds.description: The IDs of the actions the role has permission for.

items.description: The IDs of the actions the role has permission for.

dateModified.description: The last time any field of the master page was changed.

datePublished.description: The master page's most recent publication date.

keywords.description: A list of keywords describing the master page.

items.description: A list of keywords describing the master page.

pageSpecifications.description: The master page's specifications. A master page will contain 1 page specifications for its draft layout and 1 page specifications for its published layout. This field is not returned by default. It can be requested via nestedFields.

taxonomyCategoryBriefs.description: The taxonomy categories associated with this page.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this page.

externalReferenceCode.description: The parent taxonomy category's external reference code.
The parent category's `TaxonomyVocabulary` external reference code.

TaxonomyCategoryBrief.description: The taxonomy categories associated with this page.

additionalProperties.description: Block of actions allowed by the user making the request.
Block of actions allowed by the user making the request.

actions.description: Block of actions allowed by the user making the request.

auto.description: A Boolean value that specifies whether or not the Navigation Menu displays as an option when creating a new page

dateModified.description: The last time the navigation menu changed.

externalReferenceCode.description: The navigation menu's external reference code.

navigationMenuItems.description: The list of navigation menu items this navigation menu has.

siteExternalReferenceCode.description: The external reference code of the site to which this navigation menu is scoped.

navigationType.description: The navigation menu's type (primary, secondary, social).

availableLanguages.description: The list of languages the navigation menu item has a translation for.

items.description: The list of languages the navigation menu item has a translation for.

customFields.description: A list of the custom fields associated with the navigation menu item.

dateCreated.description: The navigation menu item's creation date.

dateModified.description: The last time the navigation menu item changed.

displayIcon.description: The icon that will be displayed next to this navigation menu item.

externalReferenceCode.description: The navigation menu item's external reference code.

additionalProperties.description: The localized navigation menu item's names.

name_i18n.description: The localized navigation menu item's names.

navigationMenuItemSettings.description: The type-specific settings (i.e. typeSettings) for the navigation menu item.

navigationMenuItems.description: The navigation menu items this navigation menu item has.

parentNavigationMenuId.description: The ID of the navigation menu item's parent.

NavigationMenuItem.description: The list of navigation menu items this navigation menu has.

target.description: The ID of the target specific frame.

targetType.description: The target's type (specific frame or new tab).

NavigationSettings.description: The widget page template's navigation settings.

dateModified.description: The last time the page template changed.

datePublished.description: The last time the page template was published.

externalReferenceCode.description: The page template's external reference code.

keywords.description: A list of keywords describing the page template.

items.description: A list of keywords describing the page template.

pageSpecifications.description: The page template's specifications. A page template of type content will contain 1 page specifications for its draft layout and 1 page specifications for its published layout. A page template of type widget contains only 1 page specification for its published layout. This field is not returned by default. It can be requested via nestedFields.

taxonomyCategoryBriefs.description: The taxonomy categories associated with this page.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this page template.

type.description: The type of the page template.

dateCreated.description: The page template set's creation date.

externalReferenceCode.description: The page template set's external reference code.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this page template set.

PageTemplateSettings.description: The settings of the page template.

active.description: A flag that indicates whether the widget page template is active.

additionalProperties.description: The localized descriptions of the widget page template.

pageSpecifications.description: The page's specifications. A page of type content will contain 1 page specifications for its draft layout and 1 page specifications for its published layout. A page of type widget contains only 1 page specification for its published layout. This field is not returned by default. It can be requested via nestedFields.

parentSitePageExternalReferenceCode.description: The parent page external reference code or null if it is a top level page.

taxonomyCategoryBriefs.description: The taxonomy categories associated with this page.

uuid.description: A valid external identifier to reference this page.

queryString.description: The default parameter for a page.

target.description: The ID of the target specific frame.

targetType.description: The target's type (specific frame or new tab).

customMetaTags.description: A list of custom meta tags this page has.

customizable.description: A flag that indicates whether the widget page is customizable.

customizableSectionIds.description: The IDs of the customizable sections.

items.description: The IDs of the customizable sections.

inheritChanges.description: Whether this widget page will inherit changes made to the associated widget page template.

layoutTemplateId.description: The ID of the layout template.

matomoAnalyticsScript.description: Set the script for Matomo that is used for this set of pages. Enter the full script code including the script start and end tags.

googleAnalytics4CustomConfig.description: Set the Google Analytics 4 (GA4) custom options that are used for this set of pages. This is a JSON configuration for gtag().

googleAnalyticsId.description: Set the Google Analytics ID (UA/GA3) that is used for this set of pages.

trashEntriesMaxAge.description: The time, in minutes, that entries are kept in the Recycle Bin. Entries that have been in the Recycle Bin for more than this time are automatically deleted.

mapProviderKey.description: Sets the maps API provider to use when displaying geolocalized assets.
